name: Best Check Cash
description_short: ACE Cash Express operates 10+ locations in the Atlanta area offering check cashing, money orders, bill payment, and financial services without requiring a bank account.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is a multi-location financial services provider with a significant presence in the Atlanta metropolitan area, including branches in Atlanta proper, Decatur, College Park, Smyrna, Jonesboro, Lithia Springs, and Riverdale. The company specializes in alternative financial services traditionally used by unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to cash and money movement services. ACE's core offerings include check cashing (no bank account required, only valid government-issued ID), money orders, bill payment services for utilities and rent, MoneyGram money transfers, and ATM access. Beyond basic check cashing, they offer prepaid card products (ACE Elite Visa and Flare Account), mobile banking through the Porte app, and tax services. Store hours generally range from 9:00 AM–7:00 PM, with some locations opening at 10:00 AM or closing at 6:00 PM. ACE differentiates itself through widespread physical location availability in the Atlanta region, same-day service model, and integration of banking products (via Pathward, Member FDIC) alongside traditional check-cashing services. Their emphasis on serving neighborhoods like Midtown, Buckhead, and Old Fourth Ward suggests deliberate geographic targeting of underserved communities. The company positions convenience and speed as primary value propositions—no bank account requirement removes a major barrier for their target demographic. While ACE emphasizes convenience and accessibility, consumers should note that fees for check cashing, money orders, and money transfers are not transparent from available information. The company's reliance on prepaid cards and financial products through Pathward suggests revenue diversification beyond pure check-cashing fees.
pros: 10+ physical locations across Atlanta metro area with convenient hours (mostly 9 AM–7 PM)
No bank account required for check cashing—only valid government-issued ID needed
Wide range of services under one roof: check cashing, money orders, bill pay, money transfers, tax services
Integrated prepaid debit card and mobile banking options (Porte, Flare Account, ACE Elite Visa) for unbanked customers
FDIC-backed deposit accounts through Pathward partnership for financial security
MoneyGram money transfer services for domestic and international payments
Bill payment services for multiple categories (rent, utilities, credit cards) with in-store cash payment option
cons: No fee disclosure on website; check-cashing fees typically range 2–5% depending on check type, creating hidden cost uncertainty
Limited information on prepaid card fees, monthly maintenance costs, and transaction limits for ACE Elite and Flare products
No mention of customer service standards, dispute resolution processes, or complaint handling procedures
Physical location-dependent service model; online check cashing or remote deposit options not mentioned
New Orleans stores noted as temporarily closed (Hurricane Ida reference), suggesting potential operational vulnerability
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need immediate check cashing without a traditional bank account
Consumers in the Atlanta area seeking convenient same-day money movement and bill payment services
Gig economy and cash-wage workers requiring frequent check cashing and money management tools
Individuals seeking FDIC-backed prepaid banking alternatives to traditional checking accounts
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for Atlanta-area residents and workers without traditional bank accounts who need fast, accessible check cashing and bill payment services. The primary caveat is that fee structures are not disclosed on the website; consumers should verify all costs before using services, as check-cashing fees can significantly reduce the value of deposited checks.
services: Porte mobile banking app with in-person support
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
